name: Red Snapper in Cream Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2 Ensure the fillets are between 1/2 inch and 3/4 inch thick.
3 Sprinkle the fillets with salt and pepper. Place in a baking dish (3 quart).
4 Pour water and white wine around the fillets.
5 Bake uncovered for 10 minutes.
6 Remove fish to a well-buttered baking dish large enough to hold the fish in a single layer. Reserve about 1/4 cup of the pan juices.
7 Melt butter in a skillet. Quickly sauté onion. Stir in flour and cook over medium heat until golden, stirring frequently.
8 Whisk in milk, oregano, and reserved pan juices. Cook until sauce is thick. Season to taste with salt.
9 Prepare Bread Crumbs (OREGANO): Crumble bread and sauté in butter until crisp. Toss with oregano.
10 Pour the sauce over fish. Sprinkle with cheese and cayenne. Sprinkle Bread Crumbs OREGANO on top of sauce.
11 Bake until sauce is bubbling (10 to 15 minutes).
12 Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges. Serve with rice pilaf, French bread, and dry white wine.
